ability.roundabout.ice_guard.desc: Blocca davanti a te, come uno scudo. Quando la barra viola si svuota, smetti di bloccare. Se il congelamento è sbloccato nel destino Vampiro, può rendere gli avversari più freddi.
ability.roundabout.aura_push.desc: Fires vampiric aura in front of you, pushing mobs it hits slightly. Also pushes you backwards if you are in the air when you shoot it.
ability.roundabout.invis_vamp.desc: If you stand still, lets you blend into your surroundings and appear completely invisible.
ability.roundabout.deflection.desc: Enter a temporary state of deflecting most incoming projectiles.
ability.roundabout.ripper_eyes.desc: Charges up a continuous beam that does massive damage and bleed, traveling through even blocks. Can be interrupted. If you press it again, you can fire it off early as a weaker projectile.
instruction.roundabout.passive_manhattan: Entra in modalità controllo or attiva la visione del vento
ability.roundabout.punch.desc: Tira un pugno davanti a te. Tieni premuto per una combo di 3 colpi!
ability.roundabout.guard.desc: Blocca davanti a te, come uno scudo. Quando la barra viola si svuota, smetti di bloccare.
ability.roundabout.barrage.desc: Intrappola i tuoi nemici in una scarica di pugni, facendoli volar via alla fine.
ability.roundabout.kick_barrage.desc: Una raffica che si carica più velocemente che non impediscie ai nemici di attaccare.
ability.roundabout.punch_fate.desc: Tira un pugno. Tieni premuto per attacchi continui!
ability.roundabout.sweep_kick.desc: Throws a kick in a short range directly in front of you. The knockback is quite high. If used in the air, it instead makes you slam into the ground, briefly dazing mobs it hits.
ability.roundabout.hair_grab.desc: Pulls a mob in towards you.
ability.roundabout.hair_spikes.desc: After a while, extends hair spikes around you damaging mobs in a radius.
ability.roundabout.blood_clutch.desc: After a brief delay, dashes forwards. Damages a mob on contact. If the mob that is hit can bleed, drinks their blood, potentially zombifying them on death.
ability.roundabout.ice_clutch.desc: After a brief delay, dashes forwards. Damages a mob on contact. If the mob can be frozen, begins the process off freezing them, potentially slowing and weakening them. When fully frozen, mobs shatter on hit. Must be unlocked in vampire fate.
ability.roundabout.dodge_air.desc: Uno scatto in avanti, utile per schivare. Se lo usi con un salto, se lo usi con un salto va più lontano, but takes longer to recharge. Can be used in the air, making you turn invisible briefly in the process.
ability.roundabout.combo.desc: Abilities build up combo points displayed above the exp bar when used consecutively. Combo points make your attacks deal more damage.
ability.roundabout.forward_barrage.desc: Mentre sta facendo una raffica, il tuo Stand inizia a fluttuare in avanti lentamente.
ability.roundabout.disc_imprint.desc: Usa un Disco Stand vuoto per rimuovere il tuo Stand e salvare i dati su di esso.
ability.roundabout.disc_swap.desc: Usa un Disco con un'altro Stand per cambiare Stand. Nessun materiale va perso durante il processo.
ability.roundabout.impale.desc: Carica un'abilità mortale che potrebbe infliggere Sanguinamento di livello 3. Devi essere vicino a un nemico per colpirlo.
ability.roundabout.impale_blitz.desc: Carica un'abilità mortale che potrebbe infliggere Sanguinamento di livello 3. Devi essere vicino a un nemico per colpirlo. Premi il tasto attacco per usarla prima, questa versione alternativa è un montante veloce che disabilita gli scudi, si chiama Star Blitz.
ability.roundabout.block_grab.desc: Prendi il blocco che stai guardando. Attacca per lanciare, Blocca per metterlo nell'inventario. Più duro è il blocco, più forte è. Utile per costruire in Soppravivenza.
ability.roundabout.item_grab.desc: Prendi l'oggetto che tieni in mano per lanciarlo. Molti hanno attributi unici.
ability.roundabout.mob_grab.desc: Prendi l'entità che stai guardando, se è vicina abbastanza è si può sollevare. lanciala, trasportala, o mettila giù gentilmente. Se sei accovaciato, l'attacchi,
ability.roundabout.mob_grab_sp.desc: Prendi l'entità che stai guardando, se è vicina abbastanza è si può sollevare. lanciala, trasportala, o mettila giù gentilmente. Se sei accovaciato, l'attacchi. Può anche rimuovere i germogli di carne.
ability.roundabout.phase_grab.desc: Il tuo Stand fluttua in avanti, trapasando blocchi con aperture tipo le sbarre di ferro o le lastre. Prende gli oggetti da lontano, o interagisce con le leve e le porte.
ability.roundabout.dodge.desc: Uno scoppio di velocità, utile per schivare. Se lo usi con un salto, va più lontano, ma ci mette di più per caricarsi.
ability.roundabout.stand_leap.desc: Usa il potere del tuo Stand per saltare sul blocco che stai guardando, se è in portata. Può andare più lontano verticalmente che orizzontalmente.
ability.roundabout.stand_leap_rebound.de: Rimbalza dai muri nel mezzo di uno sbalzo, ti lancia nella direzione in cui stai guardando.
ability.roundabout.fall_brace.desc: Usa il potere del tuo Stand per attutire l'impatto di una caduta. Le cadute lunghe faranno comunque danno, ma ridotto.
ability.roundabout.vault.desc: Premi mentre guardi un bordo, il tuo Stand estende il braccio è ti lancia su.
ability.roundabout.time_stop.desc: Carica per fermare il tempo, immobilizza tutto! Puoi far riscorrere il tempo prima per una ricarica più veloce, e le azioni fatte nel tempo fermo influenzano il tempo di ricarica.
ability.roundabout.time_stop_impulse.des: Ferma subito il tempo senza dover premere un tasto due volte. Esiste solo come un tasto di panico per evitare gli attacchi in arrivo.
ability.roundabout.scope.desc: Ingrandiscie con la vista di Star Platinum fino a 3 livelli, con visione notturna. Utile in miniera o per vedere da lontano. Afferra certi proiettili.
ability.roundabout.star_finger.desc: Allunga le dita di Star Platinum fino a 8 blocchi! Penetra tra i mob e gli scudi, è può infliggere Sanguinamento. Se attacchi, usa una versione meno potente ma più veloce.
ability.roundabout.inhale.desc: Star Platinum risucchia aira rapidamente, tirando le entità verso di te. Ottimo per raccogliere oggetti e esperienza perterra!
ability.roundabout.final_punch.desc: Tieni premuto e rilascia per tirare un pugno super potente! Più tieni premuto, più forte è.
ability.roundabout.final_kick.desc: Tieni premuto e rilascia per tirare un calcio super potente! Più tieni premuto, più forte è.
ability.roundabout.assault.desc: The World fluttua in avanti, attaccando chiunque tocchi, infliggendo Sanguinamento! Premendo Presa mentre questa mossa è attiva fa raccogliere i blocchi. For the attack, it becomes more powerful the longer it charges, so spinning it around like a flail lets it reach maximum power.
ability.roundabout.air_tanks.desc: Le taniche sulla schiena di The World ti danno aria extra, così puoi stare sottacqua più a lungo.
ability.roundabout.fog_sword.desc: Your weapon attacks charge up faster, and you mine at a faster speed while Justice is active.
ability.roundabout.cast_fog.desc: Casts fog over a large area, exposing illusionary blocks and animating corpses for you to control. Players without Justice see less.
ability.roundabout.fog_morph_2.desc: Appear to others as a villager. Has decent trades at fixed rates, and are respected by golems.
ability.roundabout.fog_morph_3.desc: Appear to others as a zombie. You will be ignored by other zombies, but feared by villagers and attacked by golems.
ability.roundabout.fog_morph_4.desc: Appear to others as a skeleton. You will be ignored by other skeletons, but hated by wolves, dogs, and golems.
ability.roundabout.fog_chain.desc: Pulls mobs that are bleeding in fog towards the block you are looking at. Many mobs can bleed if you attack them with scissors, charged glaives, knives, or barbed wires.
ability.roundabout.fog_blocks.desc: Create limitless fog blocks, on demand. When placed, they can only be seen while fog is cast, and can be walked through (as they are just illusions).
ability.roundabout.corpse_army.desc: Acquire corpses with Executioner's Axe or Scissors (Justice User only), and craft a body bag to store them in. You can control these corpses if they are in your fog range. Corpses must be inactive or full health to be picked up by a body bag. Zombies, Skeletons, Creepers, Spiders, Villagers/Illagers, and Phantoms can become corpses. Interact with spider corpses you control to ride them.
ability.roundabout.zombie_corpse.desc: Zombie corpses can be acquired from zombies and husks. When activated, they are the most basic and well balanced army unit. If you crouch and interact with them, you can give them your held item, or trade their held item back. They can place blocks they are given if commanded to directly with interact in control mode, and can use mining tools to mine with the same control. Note that held items trade off corpse armor piercing damage. Healed with rotten flesh while inactive.
ability.roundabout.villager_corpse.desc: Villager corpses can be acquired from villagers, witches, and other illagers you may find in a raid. They are similar to zombie corpses, albeit slightly faster and weaker, and cannot be given items. Their strength lies in their hidden resistance to projectiles, making them great at charging at those who are wielding ranged weapons. Healed with emeralds while inactive.
ability.roundabout.creeper_corpse.desc: Creeper corpses can be acquired from creepers. They act as creepers do, so they may be a bit dangerous to use. However, in control mode, pressing interact on them detonates them. If you select and move a fallen creeper around first, this can be utilized to deliberately blow up holes in walls, or simply help you mine. Healed with gunpowder while inactive.
ability.roundabout.skeleton_corpse.desc: Skeleton corpses can be acquired from skeletons and strays. They are an overwhelming long range option. While not very powerful, they are good at knocking back and interrupting foes with their synchronized group shots. Just be careful, as their arrows can harm you as well, and the other corpses. Thus, they pair well with fallen spiders which are shorter and harder to hit with arrows. Healed with bones while inactive.
ability.roundabout.spider_corpse.desc: Spider corpses can be acquired from regular, full sized spiders. They are very fast and hard to hit. If you interact with them, you can mount them, and use them to ride up walls. They are perfect for gaining distance while eating or charging glaives. Healed with spider eyes while inactive.
ability.roundabout.phantom_corpse.desc: Phantom corpses can be acquired from phantoms. They can slowly move up and down to attack enemies who are at a different elevation than you, but their health is very low and they are vulnerable to harpoons. This is because their main use is as a mount. Exclusively at night time in the overworld, they can fly you around. This is because the night sky gives them power. Holding space makes you rise higher, and holding the dash ability key makes you sink lower. Healed with membranes while inactive.
ability.roundabout.fog_clones.desc: Create fake mirages of yourself. If you are attacked, perhaps it was one of the mirages that was attacked, not you...
ability.roundabout.tactics.desc: Highlight corpses, and change settings of highlighted corpses.
ability.roundabout.fog_pilot.desc: Switch to the perspective of Justice, and fly around the foggy sky. On top of surveying the area, you can command corpses from above to move around (use key) and attack (attack key) your targets, after highlighting the target you are mousing over (attack key). Interact with creeper corpses you control to blow them up. If you give a zombie corpse an item by sneaking and interacting, they can use tools to mine and place blocks they are holding with the attack key in this mode. Press again to return to your body.
ability.roundabout.red_lash.desc: Uses Red Bind's flame rope offensively to lash opponents, has increased reach! Hold it down for a 3 hit-combo!
ability.roundabout.flame_kick.desc: Hold and release to throw a super powerful kick! The longer you hold it down, the stronger it is. Once it charges fully, it releases automatically. Releasing it early throws a punch instead.
ability.roundabout.fireball_barrage.desc: Rapidly shoots a sequence of fireballs that knock enemies back with an explosive force, can start stand fires where they land.
ability.roundabout.flamethrower.desc: A stream of fire that can damage multiple targets at once, setting them on stand fire.
ability.roundabout.furnace.desc: Adds a button in the menus of furnace type blocks (furnace, blast furnace, and smoker). Pressing this button lights up the furnace with the stand's flames.
ability.roundabout.red_bind.desc: Winds up a lasso ability, you have to get within close range to land it. It allows you to walk mobs around as if pulling them with a lead. Attacking causes the target to rise up and be held in place for a few seconds or until hit, while blocking or pressing the button again cancels it.
ability.roundabout.flame_creation.desc: Places stand fire down where you are looking. Stand Fire spreads like normal fire, but does armor piercing damage like other stand abilities, and only stand users can see it. It is capable of burning upside down as well, and produces no smoke.
ability.roundabout.life_detector.desc: Creates a life detector made of flames, which can be pushed along. Within a 15 meter/block radius, highlights all mobs nearby.
ability.roundabout.crossfire.desc: Begins charging a powerful ankh made of flames, which gains more power, knockback, and flame spread as it grows. Press again to shoot the ankh out.
ability.roundabout.crossfire_block.desc: If holding a block and charging a crossfire hurricane, this ability becomes available. Conceals the hurricane in a floating block, and if an enemy close by hits it, it explodes on them alone.
ability.roundabout.crossfire_ground.desc: If charging a crossfire hurricane, this ability becomes available. Buries the hurricane in the ground, it will seek out and explode your last target.
ability.roundabout.crossfire_special.des: Creates a ring of stand fire around you, as well as four medium-sized crossfire hurricane ankhs which circle around you. Press again repeatedly to shoot out those ankhs.
ability.roundabout.flame_extinguish.desc: Snap away all stand fire you created at once.
ability.roundabout.projectile_burn.desc: Burns away incoming projectiles, and ignites incoming gasoline projectiles. Destroys flesh buds.
ability.roundabout.crossfire_firestorm.d: Creates a large ankh which scatters tiny flames everywhere, increasing the power of your standard crossfire hurricanes and allowing you to use them in rain. The massive toll on stand energy, however, increases their cooldowns. This does not enhance hurricane special.
ability.roundabout.fire_slam.desc: Launches Magician's Red forward, turning it into a ball of fire. It collides with extreme force and lots of flames, but in doing so your stand is sealed for a while. Only use as a last resort.
ability.roundabout.self_burn.desc: If you are cold because of certain abilities, you will gain the ability to light yourself on stand fire to counteract the cold. Normal stand fire damage applies.
ability.roundabout.spike_attack_mode.des: Lets you press or hold the attack key to launch a spike attack, pulling mobs in with a damaging attack that inflicts bleed. If interact is held, it pushes them away instead. This mode runs on a meter that must be full to use the ability, and recharges when not using it. Goes through walls.
ability.roundabout.heel_plant.desc: Extends your heel spikes into the ground, allowing you to resist most forms of knockback and walk on walls. Gives you a step height increase in both directions. Disables some abilities while active, deactivates when airborne or pressed again. It is canceled after enough enemy hits.
ability.roundabout.wall_walk_move.desc: Attaccatì ai muri, permettendoti di camminare su di essi. Attiva guardando un muro mentre hai i tacchi estesi, o mentre sei in aria.
ability.roundabout.firm_swing.desc: Makes all attacks critical attacks while your heel is planted, due to the increased force from a sturdy stance.
ability.roundabout.fall_disperse.desc: Dimezza il danno da caduta, trascinando il danno attraverso i tacchi.
ability.roundabout.corner_cut.desc: Enable this to skip the process of direction adjustment when running off a wall to cut corners. Also inhibits accidental jumps and lowers speed. Think of it as training wheels.
ability.roundabout.visage_creation.desc: Ti permette di usare punti esperienza per creare qualsiasi viso ti piaccia, o per creare un Rossetto Fortunato. I PNG con questo Stand potrebbelo fartelo costare.
ability.roundabout.face_removal.desc: Lancia un attacco che infligge Sanguinamento e Senza Faccia, un effetto che indeboliscie i mob contro gli attacchi e rende alcuni mob auto-coscienti. Colpi seguenti di questo attacco aumentano il livello dell'effetto.
ability.roundabout.visages.desc: Facce di personaggi iconici che puoi creare. Equipaggia nell'inventario Stand (questo menu). Lo slot maschera cambia l'apparenza, e lo slot voci potrebbe aggiungere frasi dipendendo dal viso.
ability.roundabout.lucky_lipstick.desc: Applica ogni 3 minuti, prima che finisca l'effetto, e brillerai con la bellezz, catturando l'amore. I Villici ti daranno scambi migliori. Applica finché dormi o bevi del latte, o potrebbe accadere qualcosa di brutto...
ability.roundabout.encasement_strike.des: Hold and release to throw a powerful kick! If you fully charge it, it becomes less damaging punch, but encases the target in a bubble and makes them float away.
ability.roundabout.bubble_barrage.desc: Charges a bunch of punches which do not directly damage opponents. Rather, they bury explosive bubbles into the ground which start moving towards recent attack targets, then pop out of the ground and fire at the targets.
ability.roundabout.bubble_selection.desc: Opens a selection screen to choose something to "take away" things. Changes all plunder bubbles you create after selecting from the screen. The screen gives detailed descriptions of every plunder type.
ability.roundabout.go_beyond.desc: Ends explosive spin mode to launch an imaginary bubble. It does not exist in this world, passing through mobs, blocks, time stop, shields, logic itself, and other things. It seeks out the target you are hovering over when you launch it, and cannot be stopped. It does massive damage and knockback, inflicting high bleed.
ability.roundabout.bubble_spread.desc: Spreads many plunder bubbles around you, taking away things on contact. If the spread exists, this ability instead pops the entire spread.
ability.roundabout.bubble_spread_redirec: Redirects bubbles created from bubble spread towards the block or entity you are facing. Only applies to bubbles that have not yet taken things away.
ability.roundabout.plunder_bubble.desc: Creates a bubble that takes things away when it makes contact. Use bubble selection to choose what these things are. The bubble follows your cursor as it moves forward.
ability.roundabout.bubble_pop.desc: Scoppia tutte le bolle attualmente attive. Si applica a quasi tutti i tipi di bolle, incluse le bolle di modalità fuoco, che fanno contraccolpo attorno ad esse quando scoppiano.
ability.roundabout.bubble_redirect.desc: Redirects plunder bubbles that have already taken something away towards the block or entity you are facing.
ability.roundabout.item_launching_bubble: Creates an explosive bubble that launches your held item. It drops the item and hurts on contact, but if you use the bubble pop skill manually, it launches the item towards whatever you are facing. Can be used for building.
ability.roundabout.bubble_scaffold.desc: Builds temporary blocks of bubbles towards the direction you are facing, moving your cursor changes its building direction as it builds. You can move more slowly over these blocks. But you can also climb them like a ladder, drop through them, and protect mobs that land on them from a lot of fall damage.
ability.roundabout.encasement_bubble.des: Creates an encasement bubble. Players can right click encasement bubbles to become surrounded by them, increasing jump height as jump is held, removing fall damage, and providing immunity to certain things like Powder Snow or Air Pressure. Attacking with a sharp object or taking damage pops it. Can also touch non-player mobs to go over them as protection and can be sheared off.
ability.roundabout.shooting_mode.desc: Toggles shooting mode. You stop holding items, and instead you fire off explosive bubbles when you press the attack button. Once the red bar on the bottom reaches the top, you cannot shoot, and need to wait for it to decrease. Fill the blue bar by shooting to enter explosive spin mode where you temporarily can shoot infinitely and potentially fire off go beyond.
ability.roundabout.water_shield.desc: Uses up water in a held water bottle to shield you from many projectile types for a short while. If they make contact, they instead turn into explosive item bubbles which you can pop to launch back at foes. Also puts out fires on you.
ability.roundabout.plug_wound.desc: Restores a tiny amount of health and cures up to 1 level of bleed. Amidst this process, you are slowed.
ability.roundabout.danger_yap.desc: Hey Ya guarderà attorno per mob che ti vogliono attaccare, e te lo farà sapere.
ability.roundabout.mining_yap.desc: Hey Ya guarderà attorno per minerali, e te lo farà sapere.
ability.roundabout.yap_yap.desc: Hey Ya ti incoraggierà e ti migliorerà la giornata!
ability.roundabout.chrono_vision.desc: Ti permette di vedere orologi fantasma alla posizione invertibile di un'entità. La linea viola ti permette di vedere dove stava guardando.
ability.roundabout.rewind_time.desc: Inverte il tempo di 6 secondi alle posizioni che puoi vedere con Crono-Visione. Inverte cose come pozioni, saluti, e stati di entità. Non inverte tutto riguardo ad un'entità, è non inverte blocchi/oggetti/tempi di ricarica. Ma può salvarti la vita e disorientare i tuoi avversari. Uccidere mob/interferire con i blocchi distorce il tempo, causando un tempo di ricarica più lungo.
ability.roundabout.watch_switch.desc: Una manifestazione del tuo interrutore mentale per invertire il tempo. Equipaggia e cambia tra orologi. As it is physical, those without stands can see it.
ability.roundabout.clock.desc: Dimostra un'orologio, cosi puoi sapere l'ora nelle dimensione applicabili.
ability.roundabout.throw_bottle.desc: Throws a held water bottle directly from your inventory, it travels far and is good for activating the stand.
ability.roundabout.summon_survivor.desc: Place your stand down where you are looking, up to a certain range. When it is doused with water, it activates, and zaps the nerves of nearby mobs. This causes them to fight each other to the death. You can be zapped as well, locking you into a fight. When zapped, melee power increases, and you resist damage that is not melee.
ability.roundabout.desummon_survivor.des: Every instance of your stand that you place down starts to disappear. This does not remove existing anger, so be careful what violence you choose to incite.
ability.roundabout.target_zap.desc: Lets you select which mobs fight each other! Enter selection mode, use your attack key to select an activated survivor, then one target, and then another. They will then fight! Press the ability key again to cancel or redo selection. While this mode is active, your survivors will not automatically zap mobs together.
ability.roundabout.stand_vision.desc: Ti permette di vedere gli Stand e i fenomeni fantasmi. Questa abilità si applica anche quando hai altri poteri, finché hai uno Stand.
ability.roundabout.stand_passives.desc: Alcune abilità Stand tipo la riduzzione di danno da caduta o l'attivazione di fornaci funzionano anche con altri poteri, serve solo che hai lo Stand corrispondente equippaggiato.
ability.roundabout.stand_summon.desc: Ti permette di evocare e usare il tuo Stand, e tutte le sue abilità viste nella pagina disco Stand.
ability.roundabout.invisivision.desc: Turn on and off the able to see see-through versions of blocks and entities that you turn invisible with your power. Turning it off is useful to get the perspective of someone without the stand, and to see through invisible blocks better.
ability.roundabout.invisiburst.desc: Release your emotions in a burst of invisibility, making you and all nearby entities invisible. It decreases your range of being seen, and wears off overtime, or when you do certain actions. Activating this ability briefly lets mobs see you. If the stand griefing gamerule is off, temporarily makes blocks that are not ores around you invisible too, which can assist in mining. Invisible blocks are without properties, and cannot be blown up.
ability.roundabout.controlled_burst.desc: A variation of Invisiburst with decreased range and no block invisibility. Signifies greater control of the user's emotions. Useful if you don't want to accidentally make your opponents invisible.
ability.roundabout.place_invis.desc: Place blocks, passing your invisibility duration down to them. Only works while you are invisible. To activate this skill, you must be holding a block and invisible.
ability.roundabout.ratt_scope.desc: Hold Ratt and scope in, allowing you to shoot while moving. Interacting builds charge, and punching releases it as a flurry of darts.
ability.roundabout.ratt_fire.desc: Shoots a volley of three darts, inflicting melt and disabling guard on the final hit.
ability.roundabout.ratt_mode_change.desc: Changes your manual firing mode between Single Fire and Burst Fire. Single Fire shoots one, stronger dart with greater knockback, damage, and melt duration.
ability.roundabout.ratt_place.desc: Place Ratt down, allowing Ratt to fire alongside you. Sneaking highlights ratt and displays the distance to you. Ratt is immune to being hit for a brief period upon being placed.
ability.roundabout.ratt_place_burst.desc: Shoot a burst of 3 darts from Ratt's position to your cursor.
ability.roundabout.ratt_auto.desc: Target an entity in sight and Ratt will automatically fire at it.
ability.roundabout.ratt_flesh.desc: Drops from melting creatures. Slows mobs and is difficult to break. However, having Ratt equipped bypasses these restrictions, allowing you to move freely and pick them up instantly by right-clicking.
ability.roundabout.ratt_bucket.desc: Buckets can pick up ratt flesh in a wide area, allowing you to quickly pick and place them down.
ability.roundabout.ratt_leap.desc: Launches Ratt in a direction, allowing you to quickly reposition them.
ability.roundabout.ratt_mining.desc: Locks Ratt to the block you are facing, causing it to automatically shoot in that direction indefinitely. In this mode, if griefing is enabled, it can melt blocks, making it gradually drill a hole.
ability.roundabout.anubis_attack.desc: Swing Anubis, dealing a sweeping attack. Goes through walls
ability.roundabout.anubis_sneak_attack.d: Swipe lower, dealing more knockback and sending further. Different combinations of your first and second attack will result in a different third attack
ability.roundabout.anubis_pogo.desc: Dive forwards and swing your sword, breaking shield. Does not require your attacks to be off cooldown.
ability.roundabout.anubis_double_cut.des: Swipe twice, launching targets away. Done by using normal attack twice
ability.roundabout.anubis_uppercut.desc: Swipe upwards, launching you and the target into the air. Holding sneak keeps you grounded. Done by using at least one crouching attack
ability.roundabout.anubis_thrust.desc: Stab forwards, bleeding and pulling in targets. Is more effective at the right distance. Done by using two sneak attacks.
ability.roundabout.anubis_quickdraw.desc: Wind up your sword, then lunge forwards with incredible speed, cutting everything in your path
ability.roundabout.anubis_shieldbreak.de: Do a brief windup, then swipe in front of you. Does moderate knockback and breaks shields for a long time.
ability.roundabout.anubis_alluring_light: Hypnotize all mobs near you, causing them to follow you for a while.
ability.roundabout.anubis_raging_light.d: Force all mobs nearby to target you.
ability.roundabout.anubis_backflip.desc: Backflip to safety and can be done midair, restoring your pogo. Hold sneak to fastfall.
ability.roundabout.anubis_record.desc: Choose a slot and record a series of inputs. Pressing your hotbar keys lets you change the icon. The duration scales with your level
ability.roundabout.anubis_replay.desc: Choose a slot and replay the memories stored within.
ability.roundabout.anubis_mouse.desc: Using this while hovering on a memory slot will allow it to remember your mouse motions.
ability.roundabout.anubis_exp.desc: Due to Anubis' learning ability, you passively gain up to 50% more exp, even while Anubis is inactive
ability.roundabout.anubis_speed.desc: Anubis grants incredible athletic ability, allowing you to move much faster and jump higher than before
ability.roundabout.blood_drink.desc: Consume blood through your hands so long as you remain facing your target, damaging them to restore your blood. If a mob has drinkable blood, the indicator will appear in the middle of the screen. If a mob is not agitated, you can score a critical blood suck. Villagers and Illagers will zombify upon being killed by this skill, and can be controlled. You can also absorb held plants for direct health.
ability.roundabout.blood_drink_simple.de: Consume blood so long as you remain facing your target, damaging them to restore your blood. If a mob has drinkable blood, the indicator will appear in the middle of the screen. If a mob is not agitated, you can score a critical blood suck.
ability.roundabout.vampire_passive.desc: You evaporate in sunlight. You run on blood instead of hunger, and eating raw foods and monster drops provide blood with no penalties. You cannot die of starvation. Drowning only lowers your speed. Iron Golems detest you, while zombies are neutral with your presence. You take decreased fall damage.
ability.roundabout.mass_heal.desc: Funnels all of your blood into health regeneration, temporarily slowing you down. This ability triggers automatically when you die, if possible, providing a last stand.
ability.roundabout.wall_walk_vamp.desc: Latches onto walls, allowing you to walk slowly on them. Trigger by facing a wall in the air. Press again while wall walking and facing another wall to switch walls, or to step onto ceilings.
ability.roundabout.vampire_vision.desc: While enabled, allows for passive dark vision as well as a longer jump height while jump is held. (The jump height skill indicates how high this currently is)
ability.roundabout.zombie_passive.desc: You are harmed by smite. Some potion effects are nullified or reversed: you are classified as undead.
ability.roundabout.zombie_passive_2.desc: Your strength, defense, and held jump height are increased. You can see in the dark.
ability.roundabout.zombie_disguise.desc: Activate or de-activate freely. If your disguise is on, you are treated normally by golems and targeted by zombies. However, many of your zombie abilities and properties are sealed to make the disguise convincing.
ability.roundabout.zombie_worm.desc: Killing enemies with blood suck gives you a zombiefish which you can then summon. Maxes at 5. Zombiefish target your attack target.
ability.roundabout.zombie_projectiles.de: If you are holding knives, arrows, or knife bundles, you can sift them through your body and fire them off shotgun style.
ability.roundabout.zombie_enter.desc: Lets you mount just about any animal. Passively, so long as you are not disguised, you hide inside of animals you are mounted to and this lets you drive them past the sun so long as you do not attack/use items.
ability.roundabout.vamp_jump_boost.desc: Da un'altezza di salto di 3 metri e di 5 metri mentre sei accovaciato. Tieni premuto per salti più alti, e premi per salti più corti. Con le mosse dei poteri, da %1$s metri in più è %2$s metri in più mentre sei abbasato.
ability.roundabout.vamp_strength.desc: Exceed the limits of humanity. +%1$s percent damage for direct melee attacks against mobs, +%2$s against players.
ability.roundabout.vamp_dexterity.desc: Practice moving your limbs at unnatural speeds. +%1$s percent mining speed, +%2$s percent attack speed.
ability.roundabout.vamp_resilience.desc: Practice shifting your body to cushion against certain attack types. +%1$s percent reduced incoming melee damage, +%2$s percent reduced incoming damage from some projectiles.
ability.roundabout.hypnotism.desc: Attiva e Disattiva pusli ipnotici che attira mob vicini verso di te. Villici ipnotizati non allarmerano altri Villici per cambi di reputazione quandi gli succhi il sangue.
ability.roundabout.super_hearing.desc: Concentrate entirely on the sound of heartbeats, allowing you to find mobs through walls and estimate their health. %1$s block radius.
ability.roundabout.blood_speed.desc: A massive cheetah-like speed boost at the cost of half of your blood, allowing you to step up blocks as well. Speed increases by %1$s percent.
ability.roundabout.blood_speed.locked.de: Use consumed life force to amplify your speed...
ability.roundabout.grafting.desc: When killed by vampires, certain mobs drop parts which can be applied to your zombie minions through interaction with this upgrade. Changes their properties and/or grants new abilities.
ability.roundabout.grafting.locked.desc: Dai un potenziamento al tuo esercito di non-morti...
ability.roundabout.flesh_bud.desc: Plants a flesh bud in the mob, making them attack your enemies (and never you). Some mobs need to be at low health first.
ability.roundabout.flesh_bud.locked.desc: Assert further control over most mobs...
ability.roundabout.sacrificial_dagger.de: Instead of hurting you, sacrificial daggers now shoot out your blood as healing projectiles. It also puts living mobs under a special effect, and if they die under this effect they become vampire versions and fully heal. As a vampire, they are stronger but die in the sun- and drink blood of nearby mobs to heal.
ability.roundabout.sacrificial_dagger.lo: Your blood has special healing properties. Maybe you can use that to your advantage...
ability.roundabout.unleash_the_cold.desc: Aggiunge Vaporizing Freeze alle mosse potere. Potenzialo per migliorarlo.
ability.roundabout.unleash_the_cold.lock: Noti che la tua temperatura corporea è più bassa rispetto ad un umano. Puoi farne uso di questa proprietà? (mossa potere)
ability.roundabout.eye_manipulation.desc: Aggiunge Space Ripper Stingy Eyes alle mosse potere. Potenzialo per migliorarlo.
ability.roundabout.eye_manipulation.lock: Mentre fai pratica con la tua nuova manipolazione corporale, ti domandi cosa accadrebbe se manipolassi i tuoi fluidi oculari. (mossa potere)
ability.roundabout.gd_punch_left.desc: Separate your main hand from your body, throwing it out to attack or mine with the item in your main hand! Use again to control its movement
ability.roundabout.gd_spin_left.desc: Causes your seperated main arm to spin in place, repeatedly attacking nearby entities. If the arm is in the air, knocks anything it hits upwards.
ability.roundabout.gd_punch_right.desc: Separate your Off hand from your body, throwing it out to attack or mine with the item in your off hand! Use again to control its movement
ability.roundabout.gd_spin_right.desc: Causes your seperated Off hand  to spin in place, repeatedly attacking nearby entities. If the arm is in the air, knocks anything it hits upwards.
ability.roundabout.gd_mold_leap.desc: Separates your torso and legs, and launches you in the direction you are looking, allowing for great horizontal moblity whilst letting you avoid fall damage. Leaves you crawling while your legs float back to you, damaging mobs they come into contact with and letting you walk again. Your legs automatically return after a time. Block to stop your legs from moving
ability.roundabout.gd_mold_field.desc: Entities in range of your mold will take heavy damage as they get lower. Entities killed in this way have a chance to drop their head. In addition, any entities that die in the mold will increase its range and duration.
ability.roundabout.gd_stitch.desc: Stitches you up, recovering a tiny bit of health, and reducing bleed by 1 level
ability.roundabout.gd_pardon.desc: Select entities as allies, making them unaffected by your mold
ability.roundabout.gd_mold_spread.desc: Create a cloud of mold spores, affecting all entities caught in them with mold. These spores drift downwards, increasing in range until they hit the floor
ability.roundabout.kq_fast_kick.desc: Carica un calcio che [WIP], una carica piena fa invece un pugno pesante con contraccolpo alto
ability.roundabout.kq_guard_bubble.desc: Usa le bolle di Stray Cat per proteggierti, aumentanto la tua guardia
ability.roundabout.kq_config.desc: Decidi come funziona la bomba primaria, distruzione blocchi: fa esplodere i blocchi attorno l'esplosione; a contatto: esplode automaticamente quando toccato da entità
ability.roundabout.kq_detonate.desc: Innesca la bomba primaria attualmente attiva
ability.roundabout.kq_defuse.desc: Disinnesca la bomba primaria attualmente attiva
ability.roundabout.kq_bomb_block.desc: Piazza una bomba sul blocco che stai guardando
ability.roundabout.kq_bomb_item.desc: Piazza una bomba sull'oggetto che stai tenendo, viene gettato quando esplode se lo stai tenendo
ability.roundabout.kq_bomb_mob.desc: Plants a bomb on the mob you are facing, it slows you down a lot, and has 3 seconds windup, but it will deal 25 damage on mobs and insta-kill players when detonating
ability.roundabout.kq_bomb_bubble.desc: Lancia una bolla di Stray Cat trasformata in bomba, premi l'abilità di nuovo per cambiare direzione
ability.roundabout.kq_sha_summon.desc: Evoca Sheer Heart Attack, prenderà di mira l'entità/il blocco più caldo/a e esploderà a contatto. 'Guarda verso di me!'
ability.roundabout.kq_sha_throw.desc: Tira Sheer Heart Attack nella direzione in cui stai guardando, prenderà di mira l'entità/il blocco più caldo/a e esploderà a contatto. 'Sheer Heart Attack non ha punti deboli.'
ability.roundabout.kq_btd_mode.desc: Scambia tra le mossi normali e Bites The Dust
ability.roundabout.kq_btd_day.desc: Piazza Bites The Dust sull'entità che stai guardando, quando innescata, tutto riparte dall'inizio della giornata, i bersagli sono destinati a esplodere quando la giornata ritorna all'ora dell'esplosione, lo Stand è bloccato finchè non disattivi Bites The Dust, che salva i bersagli dall'esplosione
ability.roundabout.kq_btd_combat.desc: Piazza Bites The Dust sull'entità che stai guardando, quando innescata, tutto riparte dagl'ultimi 20 secondi, i bersagli sono destinati a esplodere quando la giornata ritorna all'ora dell'esplosione, lo Stand è bloccato finchè non disattivi Bites The Dust, che salva i bersagli dall'esplosione
ability.roundabout.meteor_shower.desc: Draws meteors from the sky towards you. They are small and cause no terrain damage but pass through blocks and hit anything in between. They inflict bleed and good damage.If shifting they will go towards your feet.
ability.roundabout.big_meteor.desc: Draws a single large meteor from the sky towards you. Does terrain damage as it comes your way. If used in conjunction with Stand Targeting, it creates a bigger blast that could be used to gradually mine down. They inflict bleed 2 and very heavy damage.
ability.roundabout.stand_targeting.desc: Your stand floats very quickly to the spot you are looking at, and buries itself in the ground upon summoning a meteor, so the meteor heads to the stand instead of the user. You can now make meteors mine a designated space on the ground instead of relying on weird angles onto your body. The downside is your body is no longer protected.
ability.roundabout.stand_retrieving.desc: Makes your stand come back, making it so that meteors go back to falling towards you
ability.roundabout.desintegration.desc: This Stand adjusts the angle of entry of countless meteorites floating in space towards its user, drawing them towards Earth. The meteorites burn up just before touching the user, so they can never hit it.
ability.roundabout.meteor_tracking.desc: Toggle between meteor tracking on/off. When meteor tracking is on all meteors in the meteor shower will follow you.
ability.roundabout.forced_dissintegratio: Makes all current big meteors disintegrate. This move is useful to avoid destruction.
ability.roundabout.gra.desc: When in stand targeting mode if anyone gets close enough to planet waves they will get grabbed.
ability.roundabout.manual_shooting.desc: Allows you to press left click with your mouse shoot in the direction you want if you are controlling the stand and it contains any storable projectile. If you decide to keep automatic shooting, the stand will instantly redirect it towards the nearest moving entity when it's able to.
ability.roundabout.control_mode.desc: Lets you control the stand. If in manual shooting mode, press left click with your mouse if the stand contains a bullet to shoot it into the direction you are pointing at. If you don't enter control mode, the stand will slowly float forwards. The same counts if you don't give any input to the stand's movement, although if you're controlling it you can rotate you vision to decide where the stand goes.
ability.roundabout.wind_vision.desc: Lets you see your stand's wind reading from your perspective, giving you similar visuals as if you would pilot your stand.
ability.roundabout.bonus_damage.desc: When the stand redirects a bullet, a little stand damage is added to the projectile. It affects all projectiles
ability.roundabout.wind_reading.desc: The stand senses entities that move or have recently moved. When you pilot the stand, only the mobs which are 'seen' by the stand render, glowing and highlighted, else you can't see them. If you have wind vision, you can see which mobs are perceived by the stand. Also you see your circumstances with a greenish filter.
ability.roundabout.manhattan_dodge.desc: Your stand gets a quick burst of speed. Ideal for dodging stand projectiles, which are one of your greatest weakness
ability.roundabout.diver_selection.desc: Opens an impairment wheel which you can apply effects onto yourself
ability.roundabout.diver_zip.desc: Your stand dives into the ground and zips you around! Control your direction using arrow keys
ability.roundabout.emperor_heat.desc: Questo va sopra la barra d'esperienza. Aumenta mentre spari con Emperor, e quando è alta abbastanza non potrai più sparare.
ability.roundabout.emperor_squint.desc: Leggero zoom, non molto, ti rallentà un pò.
ability.roundabout.emperor_single.desc: Spara un proiettile ogni clic, fa meno calore.
ability.roundabout.emperor_triple.desc: Spara tre proietilli ogni clic, fa più calore.
ability.roundabout.emperor_control_mode_: I proiettili vanno nella direzione in cui stai guardando.
I proiettili che spari vanno automaticamente verso il bersaglio più vicino.
ability.roundabout.emperor_speed_up.desc: I tuoi proiettili accelerano mentre premi questa abilità. Più veloce va un proiettile, più danni fa.
ability.roundabout.emperor_speed_down.de: I tuoi proiettili rallentano mentre premi questa abilità. Più lento va un proiettile, meno danni fa.
leveling.roundabout.disc_wip_2: Abilità non sono complete o pronte
leveling.roundabout.levelup.memory_and_a: Sviluppo Stand: Nuova Abilità and Slot Memoria!
leveling.roundabout.levelup.vampire: Sei diventato/a più forte, Punto Abilità ottenuto!
leveling.roundabout.max_levelup.vampire: La massima altezza, ultimo Punto Abilità ottenuto!
gamerule.roundaboutStandGriefing.descrip: Controls whether or not stands can mess with blocks
gamerule.roundaboutMonsterStandFireSprea: Controls whether or not monsters with Magician's Red spread fire.
gamerule.roundaboutStandLeveling.descrip: Whether or not stands start off maxed
gamerule.roundaboutKeepStandsOnDeath.des: Whether or not you lose/drop stands when you die
gamerule.roundaboutStandRedstoneInterfer: Whether or not stands can interact with levers, redstone, etc.
gamerule.roundaboutMobGrabbing.descripti: Whether or not stands grab and carry mobs
gamerule.roundaboutSpawnWorthyMobs.descr: Whether or not mobs can spawn worthy of stands
gamerule.roundaboutSpawnStandUserMobs.de: Whether or not mobs can spawn with stands
gamerule.roundaboutRoadRollerBreakIce.de: Whether or not road rollers break fragile blocks
gamerule.roundaboutLoseFateOnDeath.descr: Whether or not you lose your fate like vampirism on death
roundabout.anubis_item.requires_mainhand: Deve essere nella Mano Principare per usarla
item.roundabout.anubis_item.message1: La spada è maledetta! Cerca un Sacerdote!
message.tusk.nearby_hole: Devi essere vicino ad un'altro buco
unlock_skin.roundabout.the_world.over_he: The World: Over Heaven Skin Unlocked!
unlock_skin.roundabout.justice.bad_bone: Justice: Bad to The Bone Skin Unlocked!
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.sight.de: Toglie la vista ai mob che ci contano su dopo che scoppia, dura qualche secondo.
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.sound.de: Toglie il suono da delle zone, assorbe tutto il suono e attacchi a base di suono finché non scoppia.
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.friction: Toglie la frizzione dal terreno, rendendolo scivoloso. Puo anche togliere la frizzione da un mob per farlo scivolare su tutte le superfici
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.items.de: Raccoglie oggetti e li porta da te.
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.mobs.des: Cattura mob piccoli e li porta da te.
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.oxygen.d: Toglie l'aria dai polmoni di un mob, cosi nel caso che siano sott'acqua, inizziano ad annegare. Può anche trascinare l'ossigeno dall'aria o dei blocchi di magma nell'acqua per recuperare il tuo ossigeno. Può anche essere usata per estinguere i fuochi, e togliere i fuochi dai mob, mettendoli d'altra parte.
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.moisture: Cattura liquidi o benzina, cosi possono essere facilmente spostati. Può anche trasportare il sangue che è perterra.
roundabout.soft_and_wet_plunder.potion_e: Sposta gli effetti pozione cosi possono essere trasferiti dai mob o sparire completamente, attacca la bolla senza il tuo Stand per rubare gli effetti.
roundabout.stand_switch.main.desc: Uno Stand con potenziale combattivo che può svilupparsi. Servono %s livelli esperienza per ottenere.
roundabout.stand_switch.secondary.desc: Uno Stand che ha meno abilità è che non può svilupparsi. Non costa esperienza per ottenere.
roundabout.stand_switch.custom.desc: Uno Stand che puoi modificare a tuo piacimento, pensalo come il tuo stesso Stand. Servono %s livelli esperienza per ottenere.
roundabout.warning.fabulous_graphics.v2: §eNote: Some modded shader visual effects do not display with the Fabulous graphics settings.§r
advancements.roundabout.root.title: Roundabout
advancements.roundabout.dimension_hop.de: Cambia dimensione con D4C per la prima volta
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_1: Le perdite non esistono, esiste solo l'imparare!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_2: La tua fortuna è uno su cinque-miliardi, puoi fare di tutto!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_3: Credi in te stesso come io credo in te!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_4: Primo posto, secondo posto, qualsiasi posto in cui tu sei è il migliore!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_5: Tieni la testa sulle spalle, non vorresti che ruoti via!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_6: Spero che la tua giornata stia andando bene, te lo meriti!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_7: Non hai nulla di cui preoccuparti, Affronterò le tue paure e dubbi!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_8: Sapevi che il tuo sorriso vale più dei diamanti?
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_9: Vai a prenderli, mostra al mondo di cosa sei fatto!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_10: Mira alle stelle, perché tu sei una di loro!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_11: Un passo alla volta, e raggiungerai la tua destinazione!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_12: So che andrai bene, lo so e basta!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_13: Puoi andare avanti al tuo passo, nulla può fermarti!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_14: Non devi guardare indietro, lo farò per te!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_15: Sapevi che sei fantastico? Lo sei davvero!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_16: La perfezione non è non avere errori, è accettare chi sei!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_17: Nessuno può abbatterti, il tuo spirito è indistruttibile!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_18: Se mai ti senti giù, ricordati che, ci sono io per te!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_20: Pizza Mozzarella! Pizza Mozzarella! Rella rella rella rella!~
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_21: Se la tua mente può concepirlo, puoi ottenerlo!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_22: Segui il battito del tuo cuore!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_23: Credici, e sei già a metà strada!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_24: Il vento soffia dove vuole, ma tu puoi far cambiare direzione alla tua vela!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_25: Sii il cambiamento che vuoi vedere!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_26: Prendi in mano il tuo sogno, e non lasciare mai andare!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_27: Spargi amore dappertutto, e ti tornerà dritto indietro!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_28: La felicità ti seguira sempre, devi solo lasciarla brillare!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_29: Ricorda, Mancherai qualsiasi colpo che non fai, quindi prendi la mira!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_30: se i tuoi piedi sono nel posto giusto, stai fermo!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_31: Non perdere mai la speranza! Sei il sole, la luna, e le stelle!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_32: La vita può essere dura, ma tu sei più duro/a, sei un/a vincitore/rice!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_33: Ricorda sempre di amarti, tu importi!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.no_34: Continua a far bruciare quel fuoco, è fallo bruciare ancora di più!
text.roundabout.hey_ya_messaging.evil.no: Perché stai parlando al tuo Stand? Fatti degli amici.
La vita è dura, fatti abitudine.
Vuoi un consiglio? Non farti ammazzare, stupidotto.
Cosa sembro, un mago? Fallo da solo.
Sei costretto a stare con me, amico. Abituati.
Sai, parlare con me non compierà nulla.
Perché non controlli da solo? Hmph. Va bene.
c'è un/o %1$s vicino, riesci a vedere?
text.roundabout.vampire.flesh_bud_fail_a: Hai già impiantato un germoglio di carne!
text.roundabout.vampire.coffin_cant_slee: Puoi dormire solo di giorno o durante una tempesta
text.roundabout.vampire.coffin_too_far: Non puoi dormire; la bara è troppo lontana

config.roundabout.fixModLoaderCreatedBug: Forge especially replaces a lot of vanilla code with its own creating new bugs. For instance, on forge you can block the warden without your shield being disabled (this is not true of vanilla). Turning on this setting fixes any bug I find like that which is actively causing the mod problems.
config.roundabout.bufferServerDistance.d: Provides a buffer to accommodate roundabout movement skills that provide short bursts of speed. Disable if it is causing problems with other mods.

config.roundabout.barragesOnlyKillOnLast: Makes barrages only kill on the last hit to send mobs flying like in the anime and manga.
config.roundabout.standPunchesGoThroughD: Turn on if you want the legacy feature (that was unintended) of stands punching through corners and doors. Off by default. Very easy cheesing, and also may make other things go through walls like go beyond highlighting.
config.roundabout.standGuardDelayTicks.d: The amount of ticks before your stand guard starts working. Vanilla shields take 5 ticks to start registering blocking, so stand guard takes 3 ticks by default.
config.roundabout.powerGuardDelayTicks.d: The amount of ticks before your powers guard starts working. Vanilla shields take 5 ticks to start registering blocking, so vampire power guard takes 1 tick by default.
config.roundabout.standGuardMultiplier.d: Buff stand guard across the board if you're playing a harder modpack.
config.roundabout.crouchingStopsStandsFr: Stand mining stops when you hit an ore by default. This is because by default, stand mining acts at the level of your fist.
